sidechain_graph_contact_census.deficit: possible explicit atom pairs minus fold-to-One atom contacts
sidechain_graph_contact_census.inner_boundary: 1/2 fold of generated adjacent C-alpha step

sidechain_graph_spatial_census.hard_exclusion_unit: one non-neighbour residue pair with at least one atom encounter
sidechain_graph_spatial_census.pair_exclusion_unit: 1/2 fold of generated adjacent C-alpha step
sidechain_graph_spatial_census.reach: n/(n+1) of generated adjacent C-alpha step
